# Task Template

## Task Code

To be generated by the system.

## Title

Short summary of the task.

## Description

Detailed task instructions.

## Category

Approved task category value.

## Priority

Approved priority value.

## Status

Approved task status value.

## Progress

Number from 0 to 100.

## Assigned To

Employee responsible for the task.

## Created By

User who created the task.

## Reviewed By

User who reviewed the task.

## Related Request

Request that created or explains this task.

## Dates

- Start date
- Due date
- Completed date
- Last progress update date

## Blocked Reason

Required when status is blocked.

## Task Updates

Progress and status history.
